players.name: 'Ace' O'Malley
players.bio: He's played every course twice. What he lacks in distance, he makes up for in wisdom and stories.

specialAbilities.name: Old School Lore
specialAbilities.effect: Negate one Wind modifier per hole.

specialAbilities.name: Straight Shooter
specialAbilities.effect: Ignore the first Scatter Die roll if using an Iron.

players.name: 'Boomer' Benson
players.bio: Physics is just a suggestion. If the ball isn't screaming, he didn't hit it hard enough.

specialAbilities.name: Crush It
specialAbilities.effect: +3 Hex Distance on any Driver shot.

specialAbilities.name: Adrenaline Hit
specialAbilities.effect: Can re-roll one Scatter Die if the target is Fairway.

players.name: 'Calamity' Jane
players.bio: She spends more time in the woods than on the fairway, but somehow always finds the cup.

specialAbilities.name: Miracle Wedge
specialAbilities.effect: No distance penalty when shooting from the Rough.

specialAbilities.name: The Scramble
specialAbilities.effect: If in a Hazard, you may draw 2 Club Cards and pick 1.

players.name: 'Dimples' Davis
players.bio: Calculates wind resistance and grass friction before every swing. A true student of the game.

specialAbilities.name: Data Point
specialAbilities.effect: Can preview the result of one Scatter Die before committing.

specialAbilities.name: Perfect Spin
specialAbilities.effect: Choose to move 1 Hex forward or back after landing on Green.

players.name: 'Evie' Eagle
players.bio: Young, fast, and fearless. She doesn't play the course; she attacks it.

specialAbilities.name: Eagle Eye
specialAbilities.effect: Ignore 'Trees' or 'Bushes' obstacles for one shot per hole.

specialAbilities.name: Momentum
specialAbilities.effect: If the previous shot was on Fairway, next shot gets +1 Accuracy.

players.name: 'Flop' Ferguson
players.bio: He might not reach the green in two, but his short game is pure magic.

specialAbilities.name: The Signature Flop
specialAbilities.effect: Wedge shots can ignore the first row of Rough near Green.

specialAbilities.name: Ice in the Veins
specialAbilities.effect: Automatic success on Putts within 2 Hexes of the hole.
